results.name: SUZLON
key_catalysts: Order book at all-time high ₹22,000 Cr
Government PLI push for wind energy
key_risks: Global supply chain delays in turbine components
results.rationale: Suzlon has transformed its balance sheet and is riding India's biggest energy transition wave. With record orders and policy tailwinds, the 4–8 week case to ₹72+ is strong. High conviction.

results.name: XCHANGING
key_catalysts: Parent DXC Technology AI services expansion in India
results.rationale: Xchanging benefits directly from the global AI-driven IT services boom funnelled through DXC Technology. India's data center expansion adds a structural tailwind to its B2B IT stack.

results.name: UCO BANK
key_catalysts: RBI rate cut cycle improving NIM outlook
India-Russia rupee trade settlement via UCO Bank
results.rationale: UCO Bank is unique as the settlement bank for India-Russia trade in rupees — a geopolitical angle not priced in. Rate cuts help, but NPA baggage makes this a 'take a call' rather than a sure bet.

results.name: BANDHAN BANK
key_risks: Already above ₹100 — not in scope today
MFI stress still being worked through
results.rationale: Filtered out — above ₹100. Placeholder entry only.

results.name: INDOSOLAR
results.rationale: While the sector is hot, Indosolar lacks the financial strength and order momentum to translate sector tailwinds into near-term price appreciation. Avoid until fundamentals improve.

results.name: GATI
results.rationale: Gati's integration into Allcargo is taking longer than expected and margins remain under pressure. The ₹100 target in 4–8 weeks is a stretch with no clear near-term catalyst.
